Container.Overview:
WackyNAS Network Dashboard is a real-time network monitoring plugin for Unraid that adds a live widget to your Unraid Dashboard and a full-page cyberpunk-style diagnostic panel at http://YOUR-IP:8888.
Features: - Dashboard widget showing public IP, ISP, ASN, location, latency and Tailscale status - Full diagnostic panel with dark cyberpunk UI at port 8888 - Public IP, ISP name, ASN number and location detection - Proxy and VPN detection on your internet connection - Ping latency bars to Cloudflare (1.1.1.1), Google (8.8.8.8), Quad9 (9.9.9.9) and your gateway - Local port status checker for HTTP, HTTPS, SSH, DNS, Plex and more - Physical network interface table (eth0, bond0, br0, Tailscale) - Docker running and stopped container counts plus RX/TX stats - Lightweight Python3 API server - no extra packages needed - Auto-starts on every Unraid boot via /boot/config/go
Container.Description: Real-time network monitoring plugin for Unraid. Adds a dashboard widget and a full-page diagnostic panel (port 8888) showing public IP, ISP, latency, port status, network interfaces, Tailscale VPN, and Docker stats. Lightweight Python3 server that auto-starts on boot with zero extra dependencies.
Container.Changes: ### 2025.03.08 ### - Initial public release - Real-time network dashboard widget on Unraid main page - Full diagnostic panel with public IP, ISP, latency, ports, interfaces - Python3 API server on port 8888 - Auto-start on boot via /boot/config/go
